nya.control_plane.host: provide your server's ip address or dns name
nya.control_plane.ssh_private_key_file: provide the path to your ssh private key file

nya.nodes.host: provide your server's ip address or dns name
nya.nodes.ssh_private_key_file: provide the path to your ssh private key file

nya.control_plane.vars.control_plane_type: where is your control plane being deployed? Options: 'cloud', 'bare_metal'
nya.control_plane.vars.secret_name: provide a secret name to use for your tls certs
nya.control_plane.vars.mkcert_os: provide the os you're building for (i.e. linux, win64)
nya.control_plane.vars.mkcert_arch: provide the cpu architecture you're building for (i.e. arm64, amd64)

nya.registry_host: provide the ip address or domain name for your docker registry. Remove it to default to the control plane
